meaning: n.[动物]西班牙种小马,母驴,驴骡
examples: 'Get up, Jennet!' my mother shouted 'Come and help me!'
'Jennet, bring the bottle! We need more drink!' shouted my mother.
It's all lies! Jennet, you're a witch-a child of the Devil! You're my daughter, and I know.
The Vanity Fair article, written by reporter Jennet Conant, cites unnamed former aides to the mayor.
The Honourable Jennet Campbell, For services to Education and to Music in Cornwall.
